name: RESIDEO TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
summary: . General As used herein, unless the context otherwise dictates, the term Resideo, the Company, we, us, or our means Resideo Technologies, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries. Our common stock began trading under the ticker symbol REZI on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) on October 29, 2018. We separated from Honeywell International Inc.
